title: The Egghead Incident Begins
description: On pages 7–9, this part focuses on Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8, Shaka, Unknown person #9, Sanji, York as The Seraphim turn against everyone, a traitor among Vegapunk’s satellites emerges, and Egghead becomes the center of a coming world-shaking incident.
scene: The Seraphim turn against everyone, a traitor among Vegapunk’s satellites emerges, and Egghead becomes the center of a coming world-shaking incident.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It looks like a giant explosion just happened!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Aahh it doesn't have a head!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Is that what the explosion noise was?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But looking at this situation... was there some enemy?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I don't think I've seen one!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It could be a mistake on our end...

dialogue.speaker: Shaka
dialogue.text: What? Didn't Edison just say "cease operations"

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: You should just wait outside, okay?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Stop York! Don't get any closer!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Mero micro micro micro micro micro micro micro micro micro micro micro micro micro micro micro micro micro micro micro micro micro

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: why are you moving on your own!?

summary: This part advances the Egghead Betrayal through 38 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
